title: Monolism's Lo-Fi Soundtrack
description: A soundtrack of Monolism's lofi music updated to the lastest versions!!
body:
##
[![minecraft-title-3.png](https://i.postimg.cc/vHcnFkck/minecraft-title-3.png)](https://postimg.cc/MvJH1s0m)
##
This is a resource pack that includes all the lo-fi songs made by Monolism and uploaded by Minecraft Youtube Channel.\
It replaces all of the **survival** songs for the lo-fi ones.  


## Track list:
- Track 1 – Echo In The Wind
- Track 2 – A Familiar Room
- Track 3 – Bromeliad
- Track 4 – Crescent Dunes
- Track 5 – Relic

## Warning ⚠️
This pack is **not compatible** with any other resources packs that modifies these songs.

**I highly recommend to set the music bar sound to ~10/20%.** I am probably changing the music volume on future updates.


## Original video:

<3
